Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6409 "THENECRISDOME-6000-6409" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $6000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Necris-Dome, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $6000 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$5F50 - $62FF $C370 - $CBFF
